actions.name: list_badge_grants
actions.description: List recent grants of a Linux DO badge. RSS endpoint: GET https://linux.do/badges/{id}.rss. Returns 404 when the target is private or not accessible anonymously; a 404 does not necessarily mean the resource does not exist. On a 429/rate-limit error, retry later or fetch the endpoint URL directly from a local network.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. The feed returns a fixed number of items; this truncates the parsed result locally.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Linux DO badge grants.

anyOf.description: The feed title, or null when Linux DO omits it.
The feed link, or null when Linux DO omits it.
The feed description, or null when Linux DO omits it.
The display name/username granted the badge, or null.
The username parsed from the grant guid, or null.
When the badge was granted, or null.
Who granted the badge, or null.
The grant URL, or null.

items.description: A Linux DO badge grant parsed from a badge RSS feed.

outputSchema.description: Output from listing Linux DO badge grants.

actions.name: list_category_tag_topics
actions.description: List topics with a tag inside a category. RSS endpoint: GET https://linux.do/tags/c/{slug}/{id}/{tag}.rss. Returns 404 when the target is private or not accessible anonymously; a 404 does not necessarily mean the resource does not exist. On a 429/rate-limit error, retry later or fetch the endpoint URL directly from a local network.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. The feed returns a fixed number of items; this truncates the parsed result locally.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing topics with a tag inside a Linux DO category.

anyOf.description: The feed title, or null when Linux DO omits it.
The feed link, or null when Linux DO omits it.
The feed description, or null when Linux DO omits it.
The numeric topic ID parsed from the link/guid, or null.
The topic title, or null.
The Linux DO web URL for the topic, or null.
The topic author (dc:creator), or null.
The category name, or null when absent in the feed.
Plain-text excerpt of the first post, or null.
Rendered HTML description from the feed, or null.
Publication timestamp (ISO 8601), or null.
Whether the topic is pinned, or null when omitted.
Whether the topic is closed, or null when omitted.
Whether the topic is archived, or null when omitted.

items.description: A Linux DO topic parsed from a Discourse RSS feed.

outputSchema.description: Output from listing Linux DO topics from an RSS feed.
